payload.body: Expanded root AGENTS.md with session checklist, skills routing table, harness-state rules, key docs, build/test commands, conventions, and STAR reporting.
payload.title: Recompose AGENTS.md

payload.body: Root AGENTS.md is the single entry point for agents: session start, skills routing (.agents/ + module skills), harness-state obligations, key docs, module runner, conventions, STAR.
payload.rationale: Previous AGENTS.md was placeholder text. A structured entry doc reduces agent improvisation and aligns with harness-state + Matt Pocock skill workflows already in the repo.
payload.title: AGENTS.md structure

payload.body: Exploratory initiatives such as learning MCP server development should have a dedicated repo module before they become durable product or package work.
payload.title: POCs need a registered module home

payload.body: Add modules/poc as a registered mixed-language module for prototypes, learning spikes, and short-lived initiatives. Keep it out of test-all and give it no-op module runner commands until a POC graduates into a durable module.
payload.rationale: Exploratory work like MCP learning should be discoverable through the same module registry as the rest of the repo, but should not create package, release, or CI obligations before the idea has proven useful.
payload.title: Use a dedicated poc module for exploratory initiatives

payload.body: Register modules/poc in modules.yaml and document its purpose for prototypes and learning spikes.
payload.title: Add registered poc module
